headline: FLAG-FOR-REVIEW + INDEX REGISTRATION. Oracle is currently missing from the published Fortune 500 index. First agent-baseline establishes candidate score: composite 28.4 / Developing. Dominant in-window event: March 31 2026 mass layoff of 30,000 employees (~18% workforce) via 6:00 AM termination emails with immediate Slack/system access revocation, pre-layoff employee monitoring software installation, $8-10B reallocation to AI data centers, 95% jump in net income same quarter. WARN Act investigations active in Washington and Missouri (Strauss Borrelli PLLC); no lawsuits filed as of April 4. Recommendation: human approval required to (a) confirm Oracle's intended inclusion in F500 index, (b) approve baseline 28.4 / Developing.
key_evidence: March 31 2026: ~30,000 Oracle employees (~18% global workforce) terminated via 6:00 AM emails with immediate access revocation
Pre-layoff employee monitoring software installation reported by multiple outlets
$8-10B reallocated to AI data center expansion
95% jump in net income same quarter ($6.13B)
WARN Act investigations opened by Strauss Borrelli PLLC (Washington and Missouri); state notifications filed same-day as layoff
No lawsuits filed as of April 4 2026

evidence.finding: 30,000 layoffs to fund AI data center spending.
6 AM email termination with immediate Slack lockout. Employee monitoring software pre-installed.

evidence.source: Strauss Borrelli — Washington WARN Act investigation April 1 2026
evidence.finding: Active WARN Act investigation. Same-day state notification raises 60-day notice compliance question.

evidence.source: Strauss Borrelli — Missouri WARN Act investigation April 2 2026
evidence.finding: Active WARN Act investigation in Missouri.
Layoffs framed as AI capex reallocation.

negativeSignals: Termination method structurally inverts E1 Affective Resonance and B5 Consent Orientation. Pre-layoff monitoring is the canonical adversarial-detection signal. Same-day state notification raises 60-day WARN Act notice question. India layoffs in identical mode despite different cultural notice norms.
positiveSignals: Oracle publishes annual Business Responsibility & Sustainability Report aligned to GRI standards. Code of ethics published. ESG materiality assessment exists.
human_review_question: (1) Confirm Oracle's intended inclusion in Fortune 500 index. (2) Approve first-baseline composite 28.4 / Developing. (3) Re-queue 30 days after WARN Act litigation status update.
